name: bizkol
description: Bizkol Marketing Toolbox — KOL/influencer campaign management, creator discovery, outreach, and full-funnel marketing intelligence (SEO/GEO audits, competitor research, Shopify commerce review, brand voice, content creation, campaign planning, email sequences). URL-driven new-client onboarding pre-researches the brand on the open web before asking anything. Deeply integrated with the Bizkol MCP (mcp.bizkol.ai) for campaigns, KOLs, social lookups, and email; works for merchant agencies and direct merchants.
